name: Apollo Global Management, Inc.
summary: Apollo Global Management, Inc. is a global alternative asset management firm. The company manages funds across credit, private equity, and real assets strategies. Apollo also has a retirement services business through Athene, which provides annuity and insurance products. Apollo raises and manages capital on behalf of institutional and individual investors worldwide.

products.name: Credit Funds
products.description: Investment funds focused on credit strategies managed on behalf of institutional and individual investors.

products.name: Private Equity Funds
products.description: Investment funds focused on private equity strategies managed on behalf of institutional and individual investors.

products.name: Real Assets Funds
products.description: Investment funds focused on real assets strategies managed on behalf of institutional and individual investors.

products.name: Athene Retirement Services
products.description: Retirement services business providing annuity and insurance products through Athene.

partnerships.description: Athene is Apollo's retirement services business providing annuity and insurance products.
